series_metadata.series_description: The Rehabilitation Health Records (Rolls of Microfilm) contain claimant health records, while they were at the J. Leonard Camera Center and the Walker Rehabilitation Center.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain for 10 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain until filmed, checked for quality assurance, and then destroy., Microform: Burn ; Paper: Shred
